articles.title: DeepSeek V4 Pro is the #1 open weights model — open source is not losing the AI race
articles.summary: DeepSeek V4 Pro launched this week and immediately became the number one open weights model on the GDPval-AA agentic benchmark. Open source is not losing the AI race.

articles.title: GPT-5.5 in Codex is really good. Frontier coding models are converging fast, and soon the differences will be less about raw model capability and more about harness, UX, reliability, price, and rate limits. Anthropic: release Mythos! What…
articles.summary: GPT-5.5 in Codex is really good. Frontier coding models are converging fast, and soon the differences will be less about raw model capability and more about harness, UX, reliability, price, and rate limits. Anthropic: release Mythos! What are you waiting for?

articles.title: Why this matters: DeepSeek released preview access to V4-Pro, a 1.6-trillion-parameter MoE model with a genuine one-million-token context window that matches GPT-5 and Gemini 3.0 Pro on key bench... We wrote it up:

articles.title: GPT-5.5 launched — OpenAI's biggest agentic model yet is live in ChatGPT and Codex
articles.summary: GPT-5.5 launched this week and OpenAI called it a step change. It is now live in ChatGPT, Codex, and the API, optimized for agentic coding and multi-step tasks.

articles.title: United Imaging Intelligence has released uAI NEXUS MedVLM, an open-source LLM for medical video analysis. The model claims to significantly outperform general-purpose models like GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3.1 in surgical safety and clinical repor…
articles.summary: United Imaging Intelligence has released uAI NEXUS MedVLM, an open-source LLM for medical video analysis. The model claims to significantly outperform general-purpose models like GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3.1 in surgical safety and clinical reporting benchmarks.

articles.title:
GPT-5.5 is now available in the API.

The model brings higher intelligence and stronger token efficiency to complex work, helping tasks get done with fewer retries.

articles.title: Apple paper proves AI reasoning models don't actually reason — the implications are enormous
articles.summary: Apple published a paper proving that the smartest AI reasoning models do not actually reason. If true, every high-stakes deployment of these models needs to be reconsidered.

articles.title: Bolt humanoid robot — 177cm, 11 meters per second, one of the fastest humanoid robots ever announced
articles.summary: MirrorMe unveiled Bolt, a humanoid robot that stands 177cm tall and can reach 11 meters per second. It is one of the fastest humanoid robots ever announced and represents a new class of high-speed humanoid platforms.

articles.title: Perplexity recently released research on advancing search-augmented language models. https:// research.perplexity.ai/articles/advan cing-search-augmented-language-models … The focus is on improving how language models integrate with search…
articles.summary: Perplexity recently released research on advancing search-augmented language models. https:// research.perplexity.ai/articles/advan cing-search-augmented-language-models … The focus is on improving how language models integrate with search systems — combining retrieval, ranking, and generation into a more reliable pipeline.

articles.title: OpenAI GPT-5.5: OpenAI has released GPT-5.5, a major step toward creating an AI "super app". Executive Changes at Apple: In a major industry shift, Tim Cook has stepped down as CEO of Apple, with John Ternus taking over the role.
articles.summary: OpenAI GPT-5.5: OpenAI has released GPT-5.5, a major step toward creating an AI "super app". Executive Changes at Apple: In a major industry shift, Tim Cook has stepped down as CEO of Apple, with John Ternus taking over the role.

GPT-5.5 is now available in Devin as an Agent Preview!

GPT-5.5 has set a new bar for what's possible with Devin. It runs longer and more autonomously than any GPT model we've tested, surfacing bugs no other model can catch, and investigating and fixing production issues
